{{Quote|He loves to gamble, though. All our meetings with him have been aboard the Coral Vanda, usually across gaming tables. The staff there seemed to know him quite well, though the way he was throwing money around, that may not mean anything. Croupiers always get to know the losers quickly.|[[Sena Leikvold Midanyl]] about Hoffner|<ref name="Dark Force Rising">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref>}}
'''Hoffner''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Jorj Car'das]] alongside [[Talon Karrde]].

==Biography==
[[File:KatanaFleetRediscovery-DFR1.png|thumb|right|Captain Hoffner and his crew encountered two cruisers of the lost ''Katana'' fleet after a blind hyperspace jump.]]
In [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]], while serving on one of Car'das's vessels, Karrde and Hoffner fled a pair of [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]] by making a blind [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump. By sheer coincidence, the jump landed them in the midst of the legendary [[Katana fleet|''Katana'' fleet]]. Karrde and Hoffner both initially believed that the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaughts]] were another Imperial patrol, and quickly made another jump to escape. Afterward, each man realized the true significance of what they had seen, and filed away the navigation coordinates of the fleet.

In about [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Hoffner salvaged six of the ''Katana'' fleet ships and sold them to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], not revealing to his buyer where he had found the ships. Bel Iblis went on to use these ships in raids against Imperial installations on [[Raid on Tangrene|Tangrene]] and [[Raid on Gestron|Gestron]]. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] tried to meet Hoffner at the ''[[Coral Vanda]]'' casino on [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]]. [[Niles Ferrier]], however, had already caught Hoffner and [[Raid on Pantolomin|delivered]] him to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], whom Hoffner later gave the coordinates of the ''Katana'' fleet. The speed with which he did so led Karrde to speculate that Hoffner was not tortured, but rather provided with a "large infusion of cash."
